title: Lists, Tuples, Ranges, and Comprehensions · Language Clinic: Python Copy Aliasing
summary: Model and transform ordered service records while preserving aliasing and order requirements. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python copy aliasing increment in an ordered service-record processor. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish aliasing, shallow copy, nested mutable sharing, and deliberate independent copies.
Use positive and negative indexing, slicing, strides, and bounds behavior without losing required elements.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
